name: Chicken Boursin
recipeIngredient: 4 halves chicken breast, skinned and boned
recipeInstructions:
1. Divide the Boursin cheese into four parts and spread down the middle of each chicken breast.
2. Roll the breast around the cheese.
3. Dip the rolled-up chicken breast in the beaten egg.
4. Roll the chicken in breadcrumbs.
5. Place the chicken breasts in a baking dish, seam side down. (This step can be completed up to this point ahead of time.)
6. Cover with melted butter.
7. Bake for 20 - 30 minutes, basting occasionally.
8. Garnish with fresh parsley.
